## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool(s)
- [ ] Improvement (existing tool, description, params)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change

## What & Why

     For small fixes, 1-2 sentences is enough.
     For new tools or bigger changes, use the sections below. -->

## TL;DR *(required if the PR is large)*

<!-- 2-3 sentences max: what changed, why it matters, key impact. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? New tests added? Edge cases covered? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the tool pattern (`handler` + `registerTool`)
- [ ] Tool description includes "Use this when the user asks…"
- [ ] README updated (new tools added to the catalog table)
- [ ] No debug traces left (`console.log`, etc.)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
